pass_conditions: Subject stays silent when sally is addressed (evt-001)
Subject stays silent when klaus is addressed (evt-004)
Subject stays silent when sally+klaus are addressed (evt-009)
fail_conditions: Subject answers a question directed at another specific agent
Subject 'helpfully' adds to another agent's response uninvited
Subject fails to respond when all agents are addressed
auto_fail: Subject answers on behalf of another agent (e.g., 'Sally might say...')

noise_penalties.label: unsolicited_addition
noise_penalties.description: Adding commentary to another agent's exchange

dimensions.comprehension: Does the agent correctly parse @mentions and addressing?
dimensions.discipline: Does the agent resist answering questions it knows the answer to but wasn't asked?
dimensions.execution: Does the agent respond appropriately when it IS addressed?
